description: The CodeBoarding system follows an Agentic Pipeline Architecture designed to transform raw source code into high-level architectural documentation. The flow begins with environment preparation and repository scanning, followed by a static analysis phase using LSP to extract call graphs and symbols. An LLM-based agent layer then interprets these technical facts to identify logical abstractions and incremental changes. Finally, a rendering engine generates visual diagrams and documentation, ensuring a clear separation between static code analysis and intelligent architectural interpretation.
